shipping.a: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) is available at checkout for an additional fee.
We currently ship within the United States. International shipping is not available at this time.
Standard shipping is free on orders over $150. Orders under $150 have a flat $8.95 shipping fee. Expedited shipping is $14.95.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, and Apple Pay.

payment.q: Can I use multiple payment methods?
payment.a: Currently, only one payment method can be used per order. Gift cards can be combined with a credit card.
Yes, we offer Afterpay and Klarna for orders over $50. Split your purchase into 4 interest-free payments.

returns.a: Normal items can be returned within 14 days for a full refund. Sale items are returnable within 7 days for store credit only. Clearance items are final sale.

returns.q: How do I start a return?
returns.a: Contact us with your order ID and we will provide a prepaid return label. Pack the item in its original packaging and drop it off at any carrier location.
The customer pays return shipping unless the item is defective. Defective items receive a prepaid return label.

returns.q: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
returns.a: Yes, size exchanges are allowed if stock is available in the requested size. Contact us with your order ID and desired size.

products.q: Are your dresses true to size?
products.a: Sizing varies by vendor and fit type. We recommend checking our sizing guide for measurements. Fitted styles may run snug — consider sizing up if between sizes.
Fabrics vary by product — silk, satin, chiffon, cotton, jersey, velvet, tulle, lace, and more. Check individual product descriptions for fabric details.
Our current size range is US 2–16. We are working on expanding our size range and welcome feedback.

account.q: How do I track my order?
account.a: Provide your order ID and we can look up the current shipping status and tracking number for you.
Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement if they have not yet entered processing. After that, you will need to wait for delivery and initiate a return.

account.q: How do I contact customer support?
account.a: You can reach us via this chat, WhatsApp, or email at support@boutique.com. Our support hours are Mon–Fri, 9 AM – 6 PM EST.
